name: cde-ownership
title: Ownership & Stewardship
description: CDE-authored — missing-owner assets by source, owned-vs-unowned mix & owned % by source over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: MissingBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, SUM(s.missing_owner_count) AS missing FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: OwnedMix
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT 'Owned' AS label, GREATEST(SUM(entity_count)-SUM(missing_owner_count),0) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot UNION ALL SELECT 'Unowned', SUM(missing_owner_count) FROM fact_entity_snapshot

dataAccesses.name: OwnedPctBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT d.datasource_type AS src, ROUND(100.0*(SUM(s.entity_count)-SUM(s.missing_owner_count))/NULLIF(SUM(s.entity_count),0),1) AS owned_pct FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource d ON s.datasource_key=d.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
